SC&E Elevator Pitch

SC&E is Accenture's Supply Chain & Engineering practice — the reinvention partner of choice for clients transforming product, supply chain, and capital build value chains through industry expertise, AI, and deep technology capability.

Software-Defined and Data-Driven Products
Supply Chain Resilience and ROIC Pressure
Structural Labor Scarcity and Automation
COO
Chief Operating Officer — Drives end-to-end operational efficiency, cost reduction, and service excellence across the enterprise.
CSCO
Chief Supply Chain Officer — Accountable for supply chain resilience, integrated planning, and network optimization.
Head of
Engineering
Engineering Lead — Responsible for product development, engineering reinvention, and digital product lifecycle.
CPO
Chief Procurement Officer — Owns supplier ecosystems, spend optimization, and procurement reinvention.
Head of
Manufacturing
Manufacturing Lead — Drives smart factory transformation, brownfield modernization, and autonomous operations.
Client Mandates
Across the Operating Core
Redefine Products and Value Chains
AI Adoption and Reinvention
Address Supply Chain Resiliency Challenges
